module.name: phyto_live_arrival
module.description: Adds a Live Arrival Guarantee opt-in widget at checkout, restricting dispatch to configurable allowed days of the week and holiday blackout dates to minimise transit mortality. Supports a flat LAG fee that is automatically waived above a set cart total, and generates a claim form where customers submit photo evidence within a configurable claim window. LAG status and claim history are visible on the customer order detail page, and all claim notifications are emailed to the store.
module.author: PhytoCommerce
